ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "last_census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last census */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "zip_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of zip codes in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate percentage */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU admissions */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistics being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES covid_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily report, weekly summary) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES covid_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public update */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Message content of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was posted */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county to which the update applies */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the update (e.g., health department, governor's office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_updates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
